special_mechanics.name: Jump Attack
special_mechanics.description: Mario's primary attack is jumping onto enemies. Different enemies have differing responses (e.g., Goomba flattens and is defeated, Koopa Troopa retracts into shell for projectile use)

special_mechanics.name: Size Transformation
special_mechanics.description: Collecting Super Mushroom causes Mario to grow to double size and gain ability to break bricks above him

tier_notes: Tier 2: Empirical/qualitative data only. Wikipedia source provides gameplay description and design philosophy but no quantitative physics parameters. Game is noted for 'precise controls' but specific movement values are not documented.
TODO: Movement parameters, gravity, jump physics, and sub-pixel system data are not documented in the available Wikipedia source. More technical documentation (ROM analysis, developer interviews, or physics guides) would be needed for Tier 1 data.
